name: Parmesan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the parmesan, butter, basil, and oregano in a bowl and mix well.
2. Brush or spread the mixture onto the sliced bread.
3. Place the loaves on a baking sheet.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes, until lightly browned.
5. Cut into 2-inch slices.
6. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
